frontier_title: Hub, registry, and public front door flagship finish

public_happy_path.fallback_policy: fallback rows stay explicit recovery/manual truth in desktopTupleCoverage.desktopRouteTruth and must not replace the flagship Avalonia installer path

ui_kit_and_flagship_polish.owner_boundary: chummer6-ui-kit owns shared primitives; chummer6-hub-registry owns only the publishable release proof and route truth consumed by public surfaces

media_artifacts.registry_binding: media publication refs and artifact shelf truth
media_artifacts.owner_boundary: chummer6-media-factory owns render execution; chummer6-hub-registry owns publication references after promotion

owner_boundary.chummer6-hub: renders public landing, account overlays, install claim/restore, support, and control surfaces from registry truth
owner_boundary.chummer6-hub-registry: owns release-channel, publication, install, compatibility, proof-shelf, and media publication reference truth
owner_boundary.chummer6-ui: owns desktop installer execution, workbench, in-app claim/restore, update apply helpers, and desktop UX
owner_boundary.chummer6-ui-kit: owns shared UI primitives and flagship polish substrate
owner_boundary.chummer6-media-factory: owns media render execution, receipts, previews, manifests, and asset lifecycle
owner_boundary.chummer6-design: owns public front-door, UI-kit, media, release, and flagship canon
